Event Inbox

Public metadata only. Payload values stay hidden in this console.

Journal Preview Workspace

Generated debit/credit preview from POS events. No permanent posting here.

Draft Journal Queue

Persistent journal drafts generated from previews.

Simulated Ledger Entries

Materialized simulated entries and lines from posted simulated drafts.

Trial Balance

Ending debit/credit per account from simulated ledger.

Ledger Summary by Event

Entry and amount summary by POS event type.
